title: Add test coverage for orchestrator/evaluator.py newsletter quality scoring
description: orchestrator/evaluator.py implements multi-dimensional newsletter quality scoring (_check_coverage, _check_dedup, _check_sources, _check_actionability, _check_length, _check_balance) with zero test coverage. These scores gate pipeline progression — a wrong score could silently pass low-quality newsletters or reject good ones. The private scoring methods use only string analysis with no external dependencies.
requirements: tests/test_evaluator.py covers the main evaluate() method and each private scoring sub-check
Tests use a minimal mock db object (MagicMock or simple stub)
No network access or API keys required
context: NewsletterEvaluator.__init__ takes a db object; pass MagicMock(). evaluate() takes newsletter (str) and reports (list[dict]). Private methods are all pure string/text analysis.
